visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long brown hair and a black top is standing in a warehouse store aisle, looking at a package of colorful plush pet toys shaped like sea creatures. A prominent red and blue Costco logo is at the top of the frame. (2) The camera focuses on a yellow price tag for 'CLEAN EARTH PET TOY 4 PACK' priced at $629, with detailed text explaining the toys are made from recycled plastic. (3) The woman is shown again holding the toy set, touching the plush fabric. Brightly colored subtitles and variety text overlays appear frequently near the bottom of the screen. (4) She holds the full package up to the camera, pointing at individual toys which include an orange seahorse, a grey whale, an orca, and a blue shark. The background remains the warehouse shelving with various pet products.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 這個沒有特別的嗎? (2) [Variety]: 特別可愛啊. [Subtitle]: 特別可愛啊，因為它4個629元. (3) [Variety]: 超便宜. [Subtitle]: 它是可以游泳. [Slogan]: CLEAN EARTH PET TOY 4 PACK $ 629. (4) [Variety]: 回收保特瓶做的. [Subtitle]: 它是回收保特瓶做的. (5) [Subtitle]: 嗯而且它可以漂浮在水面上，所以狗狗愛游泳的話你就可以帶它去游泳池. (6) [Subtitle]: 夏天要到了，我發現好市多最近有超多寵物玩具. [Variety]: 超可愛漂浮玩具. [Variety]: 寵物玩具. (7) [Subtitle]: 而且它們的價格都很划算哎，你大狗狗消耗率高的話一定要來這裡買. (8) [Subtitle]: 虎鯨、鯨魚、海馬、鎚頭鯊. [Variety]: 鎚頭鯊. (9) [Subtitle]: 鎚頭鯊超級可愛的. (10) [Subtitle]: 如果你去沖繩買的話一隻要300起跳. (11) [Subtitle]: 很好玩而且每個都啾啾哦，讓你的狗狗在游泳池玩的更開心. [Variety]: 更開心.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator showcasing the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long, dark wavy hair wearing a black dress or top with ruffled sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with orange industrial shelving units filled with pet supplies like dog food and various toy packages.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female vocal track over a bright, rhythmic acoustic guitar and percussion BGM. The speaker sounds enthusiastic and inquisitive. (2) A 'pop' sound effect triggers as graphical text appears. The vocal tone becomes informative yet remains at high arousal, describing the price of the toys. (3) The speaker's rate increases slightly as she lists product benefits. The BGM remains constant, providing a joyful, steady foundation. (4) The speaker's volume slightly swells with excitement while mentioning travel prices for similar items, ending with a very high-valence, positive closing exclamation accompanied by a subtle bell chime effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Price/Value Evidence -> Feature Showcase -> Social Comparison -> Final Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a specific pet toy value pack found at Costco, emphasizing its affordable price, eco-friendly material, and versatility for dogs who enjoy swimming, aimed at budget-conscious pet owners.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently displays the Costco logo and detailed price tags while the creator provides a positive testimonial about the product's value and features.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media shopping vlog featuring energetic narration and colorful text overlays to drive engagement.
